data.title: Rexford Industrial Announces Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR) has revised its 2026 Core FFO per share guidance upwards. The company also disclosed its plan to realign its portfolio by aiming to dispose of assets totaling between $1.5 billion and $2.0 billion by 2026. This announcement was made in Los Angeles on July 23, 2026.

data.title: Delek US Holdings, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. revealed a new update today, stating that its Board of Directors has given the green light for a quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share, scheduled to be distributed on August 10, 2026, to shareholders on record as of August 3, 2026. Delek US Holdings, Inc. is recognized as a diversified downstream energy entity, with interests in petroleum refining, logistics, and pipelines. The company's refining portfolio is chiefly made up of refineries based in Tyler and Big Spring, Texas.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Netflix Dives, SpaceX Scrubs Launch; AI Stocks Try To Halt Sell-Off
data.description: The stock market saw a decline in futures due to Netflix plummeting and SpaceX cancelling a Starship launch. AI-related stocks, including Sandisk, attempted to resist the downward trend before the market opening. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
Goldman Sachs offers way to trade AI junk debt $250 million at a time. $GS

data.title: Potomac Bank Announces Malinda Henkel as Vice President and Branch Business Development Officer for Winchester, Virginia, Expansion
data.description: In Charles Town, West Virginia, a recent announcement by Potomac Bank revealed the appointment of Malinda Henkel as the Vice President and Branch Business Development Officer for their new venture into Winchester, Virginia, and neighboring Frederick County. Ms. Henkel's role will involve spearheading the bank's expansion efforts in this area.

data.title: Supreme Court's Trump Tariffs Ruling May Roil Big Spending Plans
data.description: The recent Supreme Court decision could potentially set aside a number of Trump administration tariffs, leading to implications for the federal budget. As the White House looks to increase spending, this ruling may disrupt plans for significant budget allocations.

data.title: Mesirow Advises The Skin Center, a Portfolio Company of Footbridge Partners and ALZA Capital Partners, on its Sale
data.description: One of the top medical spas and cosmetic surgery practices, The Skin Center, offers various aesthetic treatments such as neurotoxins, dermal fillers, laser skin resurfacing, laser hair removal, and cosmetic surgery procedures. Mesirow served as the sole financial advisor for the company.

data.title: Fed Cuts Key Rate To Stem Job Losses; S&P 500 Rises
data.description: The Federal Reserve has decided to lower its primary interest rate in an effort to mitigate job losses. However, the S&P 500 index is responding more to the outlook for 2026 and the recent news conference held by Chair Jerome Powell. This decision led to a rise in the S&P 500 index.

data.title: Jamieson Wellness Inc. Announces Date of Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: Jamieson Wellness Inc. declared today that they will unveil their financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2026 post-market close on Thursday, August 6, 2026. Following this, they will conduct an investor conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to deliberate on the results. To join the live call, dial 1-800-717-1738 from within Canada and the U.S., or 1-646-307-1865 internationally.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pops As S&P 500 Finds Key Support; Micron, Sandisk Shares Soar (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw an increase as chip stocks Marvell, Micron, and Sandisk experienced a rally. The Nasdaq also showed a positive trend, while the S&P 500 found crucial support. Micron and Sandisk shares particularly saw significant gains. This live coverage highlights the upsurge in the market, demonstrating optimism among investors.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Techs Fall, Oil Prices Rise Amid New U.S.-Iran Attacks; Taiwan Semi, Nvidia, Micron, Sandisk
data.description: Following new U.S.-Iran attacks, tech futures experienced a decline, while oil prices surged. Taiwan Semiconductor announced positive sales and earnings on Thursday. Investor attention is on Nvidia, Sandisk, and Micron in light of recent developments. Dow Jones Futures post tech downfall and oil spikes amidst the escalating tensions. The post focused on the shifts in the market and key players such as Taiwan Semi, Nvidia, Micron, and Sandisk.

data.title: Orchid Island Capital Announces Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Orchid Island Capital, Inc. (NYSE: ORC), a real estate investment trust (REIT) based in Vero Beach, Florida, reported their operational performance for the quarter ending on June 30, 2026.

data.title: Weight Watchers Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: At the close of market on August 5, 2026, WW International, Inc. (NASDAQ: WW) will unveil its Q2 2026 financial results, covering the period ending June 30, 2026. WW, also known as Weight Watchers, is set to disclose its performance to investors and the public on this date.

data.title: Ocean Power Technologies Acquires Strategic Subsea Technology to Expand Operational Infrastructure Supporting Maritime Dominance
data.description: Acquisition Expands Company’s Operational Infrastructure Services to Subsea Sector Acquisition Expands Company’s Operational Infrastructure Services to Subsea Sector. The recent transaction involves the integration of new operational infrastructure services into the company's portfolio, specifically catering to the subsea market. This strategic move is aimed at broadening the company’s reach, with an emphasis on enhancing services for subsea operations. This expansion marks a significant milestone, indicating a shift towards diversification and increased market presence. The transaction involves the incorporation of specialized subsea services, showcasing the company's commitment to providing comprehensive solutions in the industry.
AI gaining popularity with 75% of consumers trusting its recommendations and decisions. A game-changer in various industries.

data.title: Fed's Key Inflation Rate Hot; GDP Growth Tumbles (Live Coverage)
data.description: The likelihood of a rate cut is diminishing, with the key inflation rate rising post-Fed meeting as GDP growth drops. Please refer to Investor's Business Daily for live coverage.

data.title: Next Fed Chair Likely To Be Warsh; Gold, Silver Fall, Treasury Yields Jump
data.description: On Friday, President Trump hinted that Kevin Warsh may be chosen over Kevin Hassett as the next Federal Reserve chairman. Following this news, the prices of gold, silver, and bitcoin all declined. Additionally, Treasury yields experienced an uptick in response to the speculation. This development suggests a shift in market sentiment and raises further anticipation regarding the future of the Federal Reserve leadership.

data.title: CPI Inflation Turns Cold, Though Data Has Issues; S&P 500 Rallies
data.description: Stocks are still not benefiting from a more cautious Federal Reserve projection. Following a decrease in the Consumer Price Index inflation data - despite some inaccuracies in the data - the S&P 500 saw a surge.

data.title: Jobs Report: Unemployment Jumps But Fed Cut Will Wait; S&P 500 Slips
data.description: In November, the United States saw an increase of 64,000 jobs, with the unemployment rate rising to 4.6% following the resolution of the government shutdown. Despite this, the Federal Reserve is expected to hold off on any immediate interest rate cuts. As a result of this news, the S&P 500 experienced a decline.

data.title: First Bank Announces Second Quarter 2026 Net Income of $10.9 Million
data.description: Significant increases in both loans and deposits, along with improved operating efficiency, have led to a notable expansion in tangible book value. This growth is reflected in a substantial rise in key financial metrics, with loans surging by X% and deposits increasing by Y%. The enhanced operational efficiency has also played a crucial role in driving this expansion.
